body.current_verifier_scope: The current keel-verifier does not recompute canonical provider wire-body bytes or binding_request_hash from a request body. It verifies dispatch binding by comparing exported digest fields as opaque normalized strings.
body.dispatch_digest_semantic_label: closure_v2 payload.dispatch_request_digest_semantics must exactly equal approved_request_body_bytes_at_dispatch_time before dispatch binding is considered valid
body.closure_digest_source: closure payload dispatch_request_digest_v1 normalized by string strip; blank or non-string is missing
body.permit_digest_source: export record permit.binding_request_hash normalized by string strip; blank or non-string is missing

flattening_rules.per_record_chain_entries: records[].permit.binding_request_hash applies to every chain entry in that record
flattening_rules.bundle_level_chain_entries: build a permit_id -> binding_request_hash map from records[].permit, then use permit id resolved from the chain entry payload, top-level permit_id, or resource_id when resource_type is permit

body.comparison: exact string equality after strip normalization
body.hash_algorithm_validation: none in current verifier; values are not regex-checked as sha256 hex
body.missing_rules: closed closure missing dispatch digest or permit binding digest fails WALK_CLOSURE_DIGEST_MISSING; missing_closure skips; abnormal non-closed missing dispatch digest warns but does not fail
